title: camellia furfuracea subsp. megacarpa
intro: Camellia furfuracea subsp. megacarpa is a species of flowering plant in the tea family, native to China and used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Camellia furfuracea subsp. megacarpa include its potential to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Camellia furfuracea subsp. megacarpa can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make a range of herbal preparations, including capsules and topical creams.
